title: Employee Engagement Survey Q2 2026
description: A quarterly pulse check on engagement, leadership trust, and growth opportunities.

sections.title: Engagement & Motivation
sections.description: How connected and motivated you feel at work.

questions.text: I feel motivated to go above and beyond in my work.
I am proud to work at this organisation.
I would recommend this company as a great place to work.
What most energises you at work right now?

sections.title: Leadership & Trust
sections.description: Your experience with leadership communication and decision-making.

questions.text: Leadership communicates a clear direction for the company.
I trust senior leadership to make the right decisions.
My manager gives me helpful feedback on my performance.
How would you describe leadership transparency?

sections.title: Growth & Development
sections.description: Opportunities for learning and career advancement.

questions.text: I have clear opportunities for growth and advancement here.
I receive adequate support for professional development.
Which development areas matter most to you?
What one thing would most accelerate your growth here?

sections.title: Wellbeing & Workload
sections.description: Balance, sustainability, and your overall wellbeing at work.

questions.text: My workload is manageable on a day-to-day basis.
I am able to maintain a healthy work-life balance.
How often do you feel burned out?
What would most improve your day-to-day work experience?

sections.title: Team Collaboration
sections.description: Effectiveness and dynamics of your immediate team.

questions.text: My team works well together to achieve shared goals.
I feel comfortable sharing my ideas and opinions with my team.
Cross-team collaboration is effective in this organisation.
